title: Places around town
objective: Nombrar lugares comunes de una ciudad y preguntar dónde están.

activities.feedback_incorrect: Busca el lugar donde se prestan libros.

activities.prompt: You see a doctor at the ___.
activities.feedback_correct: Hospital es el lugar donde atiende un doctor.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Elige el lugar relacionado con salud y médicos.

activities.prompt: You want to find the bank.
activities.feedback_correct: Where is pregunta por la ubicación.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Usa Where is para preguntar dónde está un lugar.

activities.instruction: Une el lugar con su función.

pairs.right: get money or use an account

activities.feedback_correct: Reconoces lugares y sus usos cotidianos.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Piensa qué actividad realizas normalmente en cada lugar.

activities.feedback_correct: La pregunta empieza con Where is.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Coloca Where is antes del nombre del lugar.

activities.prompt: The supermarket is next to the bank. The pharmacy is across from the hospital.
activities.question: What is next to the bank?
activities.feedback_correct: El audio dice the supermarket is next to the bank.

activities.prompt: Where is the library? It is next to the bank. Where is the pharmacy? It is across from the hospital.
evaluation_criteria: understandable next to and across from
activities.feedback_correct: Las preguntas y ubicaciones se entienden con claridad.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Practica los nombres largos como pharmacy y library lentamente.

activities.prompt: The city center has a library, a bank, and a café. The library is beside the café. The bank is across from the library.
activities.question: What is across from the library?
activities.feedback_correct: El texto dice the bank is across from the library.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Busca la oración con across from.

activities.prompt: Write eight sentences about places near your home. Name six places and say where two of them are.
evaluation_criteria: correct Where is or There is/are
activities.feedback_correct: Puedes hablar de lugares cercanos y sus ubicaciones.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Usa There is/are para presentar lugares y Where is para preguntar por ellos.

activities.instruction: Explora una ciudad con la IA.
activities.prompt: You are new in town. Ask the AI where six places are and explain which place you need first.
activities.feedback_correct: Puedes orientarte preguntando por lugares básicos.
activities.feedback_incorrect: La IA muestra un mapa sencillo y repite las ubicaciones difíciles.
